---
title: "Projects"
subtitle: "Selected work & explorations"
format:
  html:
    class: projects-page
---
::: {.section-label}
Browse Through My
:::

# Projects {.section-title}

A selection of my more prominent projects and technical explorations.

::: {.projects}
::: {.grid .projects-grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.project-card}
## Survival of the Fittest (Model): Optimizing with Genetic Algorithms

*Self-directed exploration beyond a non-formal class assignment*

A tutorial on using genetic algorithms to evolve hyperparameters for machine learning models. I applied bio-inspired optimization (crossover, mutation, fitness selection) to tune a Random Forest classifier and compared it against Random Search—the topic is well-established in the literature; this was my hands-on implementation to understand the approach.

- **Tools:** Quarto, Python, scikit-learn
- **Link:** [Read on Quarto Pub](https://farkasvic.quarto.pub/survival-of-the-fittest-(model-optimizing-with-genetic-algorithms/)){.project-link}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.project-card}
## Project Placeholder 2

*Add your second project here*

Brief description of the project, its goals, and outcomes.

- **Tools:** Add technologies used
- **Link:** [Add link or repo](#){.project-link}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.project-card}
## Project Placeholder 3

*Add your third project here*

Brief description of the project.

- **Tools:** Add technologies used
- **Link:** [Add link or repo](#){.project-link}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.project-card}
## Project Placeholder 4

*Add your fourth project here*

Brief description of the project.

- **Tools:** Add technologies used
- **Link:** [Add link or repo](#){.project-link}
:::
:::

:::
:::
